title: Algo trading done in Indian market, how does it look
author: helloimhello6688

comments.author: helloimhello6688
comments.body:
I'm an engineer who's been looking forward to trading for a long time. My dad's been trading for almost more than 13 yrs and me myself has been looking at market for around 4 yrs but I'm not very consistent with it. 

Throughout these years I noticed alot of things which could predict the market in some ways and I thought why don't I put it in a software and help me make a revenue. So I started building it few months ago and i have been running it for few days now. I'm adding new things to determine if the bot should take trade or now, I have put a threshold of alot of criteria to meet before it opens a trade. Im trying to make it from zero cost which is kind of giving me a hard time but it's also working. It sends me notification of the trades it took real time through telegram. I don't how to map my progress if you guys have any idea or any suggestions related to algo trading please help me with it. I'm new to algo trading. I'll add some screen shots of the data the bot gave me when it did paper trading. The data it's shown is 100 perfect real because I cross checked it in the market.

comments.author: One-Job-5435
comments.body: I’m happy to test out your algo if you would like feedback on other brokers

replies.author: helloimhello6688
replies.body: I'm down, send msg in dm

comments.author: moory52
comments.body: looks interesting, what's your win rate on this model?

replies.author: helloimhello6688
replies.body: Only ran it for couple of days, not even weeks. Currently around 92%

replies.author: moory52
replies.body: what's the strategy like? is for stocks or works in any market? why you share the code?

comments.author: Consistent-Claim-382
comments.body: Beginner here, do you mind sharing the project? Id like to refer and learn. Thanks!
